title: 2026 Oscar Predictions: Best Production Design - No Film School
text: According to No Film School's predictions, Frankenstein (Netflix) is forecasted to win Best Production Design. The prediction highlights the work of Production Designer Tamara Deverell and Set Decorator Shane Vieau. The other nominees in this category include: Hamnet (Focus Features) with Fiona Crombie and Alice Felton, Marty Supreme (A24) with Jack Fisk and Adam Willis, One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.) with Florencia Martin and Anthony Carlino, and Sinners (Warner Bros.) with Hannah Beachler and Monique Champagne. The article notes that these predictions are based on online chatter and current marketing momentum, acknowledging that this could all change before the ceremony.
